description: Lists all agents/admins in an organization. It is possible to filter by one of the mutually exclusive parameters: email or phone number. In case both are provided, an error is returned.

parameters.name: pageLimit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results per page. May be used in combination with pageKey to change the number of results in between page requests.

parameters.name: pageKey
parameters.description: Base64 encoded form of pagination query parameters. Do not try to construct or change programmatically as the internal structure may change without notice.
